why.title: Booking that finally feels effortless
why.lead: Everything you need to find, book and manage your trip — refined down to the last detail.

items.title: Smart fare search
items.text: Compare 500+ airlines in real time and lock in the lowest fare with fully transparent pricing.

items.title: Instant e-tickets
items.text: Confirm in seconds and get your e-ticket and itinerary by email, ready for check-in.

items.title: Care that travels
items.text: Free 24-hour cancellation, easy refunds and real human support whenever your plans change.

featured.title: Tokyo, reimagined
featured.text: Neon nights, serene temples and the world's smoothest transit. Fly to Tokyo with seamless connections and fares that leave room for the adventure.

offers.title: More reasons to book with FlyAir

items.title: 15% off your first booking
items.text: Use code FLYNEW15 at checkout on any flight.

items.title: Double reward miles
items.text: Earn 2× miles on every long-haul flight this month.

items.title: Free seat selection
items.text: Complimentary seat choice on Economy Plus and above.

cta.title: Clear skies ahead. Let's get you there.
cta.lead: Hundreds of airlines, one simple search, and a team that stays with you from the first tap to the final boarding call. Wherever next is, the runway's clear.

_alt.featured: Neon-lit Tokyo street scene at night with crowds, signage and the energy of the Shibuya district
_alt.dubai: Dubai skyline at dusk dominated by the Burj Khalifa rising above the surrounding high-rise towers
_alt.maldives: Row of thatched overwater villas on stilts over turquoise lagoon water in the Maldives
_alt.istanbul: Domes and slender minarets of a historic Istanbul mosque glowing warm against a blue sky
_alt.srilanka: Blue commuter train winding through lush green tea-plantation hill country in Sri Lanka
